def positive_pydantic_model_dump_then_json_dumps():
    rule_id = "pydantic_model_dump_then_json_dumps"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Pydantic v2 code serializes model_dump() output through json.dumps(...) instead of using model_dump_json()."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
